comment.body: I didn't like initial reaction rejecting prior to reaching centroid implied in ES.. figured there would be one more attempt up at rth open.  There for I set entries at es EU open range filled on the rth push down.  Filled es and then loaded up some nq took the ride up to previous news release  highs .
